files.content:
@echo off
setlocal
cd /d "%~dp0"
python scripts\forks\land_anything.py %*
exit /b %ERRORLEVEL%

# land-anything

`land-anything.bat <patch.json>` is the canonical JSON patch entry point.

The patch payload is the routing authority. The payload supplies the author/agent and the target object. The landing tool derives the integration ref and agent lane from that information.

Example gadget target:

```json
{
  "format": "LS_FORK_JSON_PATCH_V1",
  "agent": "edd",
  "target": {
    "kind": "gadget",
    "gizmo": "lambda-script",
    "gadget": "lambda-script"
  },
  "title": "Example",
  "files": []
}
```

This resolves to:

```text
integration: origin/gadgets/lambda-script/lambda-script/main
lane:        gadget-agents/lambda-script/lambda-script/edd
```

The lane is treated as a disposable carrier. Before landing the new patch, the tool reconstructs the lane from the current integration target plus durable replay entries already recorded for that agent and target. Branch topology is not authoritative: stale, ahead, behind, reset, or divergent lane carriers are handled through replay recovery when the replay payloads are present and valid.

A landing fails when the durable replay data is incomplete or cannot be applied, when the new patch cannot be applied after replay, or when the remote lane changes during the final leased push.

{
  "format": "LS_GIZMO_V1",
  "name": "lambdascript",
  "description": "Development gizmo for the LambdaScript compiler, interchange model, forks tooling, and gizmo tooling.",
  "gadgets": {
    "core": {
      "root": ".",
      "language": "mixed",
      "target_ref": "origin/gadgets/lambdascript/core/main",
      "integration_branch": "gadgets/lambdascript/core/main",
      "agent_branch_template": "gadget-agents/lambdascript/core/{agent}",
      "owned_paths": [
        "glc/",
        "examples/",
        "docs/core/",
        "docs/forks/",
        "scripts/forks/",
        "tools/gizmo/",
        "forks/",
        "forks.bat",
        "install.bat",
        "verify.bat",
        "ed-land-json.bat",
        "edd-land-json.bat",
        "eddy-land-json.bat",
        "guy-land-json.bat",
        "ed-sync-all.bat",
        "edd-sync-all.bat",
        "eddy-sync-all.bat",
        "guy-sync-all.bat",
        "gadget-creation-ed.bat",
        "gadget-creation-edd.bat",
        "gadget-creation-eddy.bat",
        "gadget-creation-guy.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-ed.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-edd.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-eddy.bat",
        "gadget-amalgamate-guy.bat",
        "agent-submit-ed.bat",
        "agent-submit-edd.bat",
        "agent-submit-eddy.bat",
        "agent-submit-guy.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-ed.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-edd.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-eddy.bat",
        "agent-amalgamate-guy.bat",
        "onepush-ed.bat",
        "onepush-edd.bat",
        "onepush-eddy.bat",
        "onepush-guy.bat",
        "create-targeted-onepush.bat",
        "land-anything.bat"
      ],
      "verification_profiles": {
        "quick": [
          "python -m py_compile scripts/forks/forks.py scripts/forks/forks_dispatch.py scripts/forks/submission_object.py scripts/forks/import_json_patch.py scripts/forks/land_json_patch.py scripts/forks/gadget_branches.py scripts/forks/gadget_land_json.py scripts/forks/gadget_verify_profiles.py scripts/forks/gadget_promote.py scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py scripts/forks/agent_land_json.py scripts/forks/main_history.py scripts/forks/replay_plan.py scripts/forks/replay_sync.py scripts/forks/accelerator.py scripts/forks/amalgamate_all.py scripts/forks/gadget_ingest_folder.py scripts/forks/gadget_creation_agent.py scripts/forks/gadget_amalgamate_safe.py scripts/forks/gadget_amalgamate_agent.py scripts/forks/agent_folder_submit.py scripts/forks/agent_amalgamate_agent.py scripts/forks/process_result.py scripts/forks/onepush_agent.py scripts/forks/targeted_onepush_create.py scripts/forks/targeted_land_agent.py scripts/forks/land_anything.py"
        ],
        "gizmo": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only tools/gizmo",
          "cd tools/gizmo && npm run build",
          "cd tools/gizmo && npm test"
        ],
        "glc-light": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install --only glc",
          "cd glc && npm test"
        ],
        "full": [
          "python scripts/forks/ensure_node_toolchains.py --install",
          "verify.bat"
        ]
      },
      "commands": {
        "forks": "forks.bat {args}",
        "glc": "cd glc && npm run glc -- {args}",
        "gizmo": "cd tools/gizmo && node dist/src/cli.js {args}",
        "accelerator": "forks.bat accelerator {args}",
        "gadget-creation-ed": "gadget-creation-ed.bat {args}",
        "gadget-creation-edd": "gadget-creation-edd.bat {args}",
        "gadget-creation-eddy": "gadget-creation-eddy.bat {args}",
        "gadget-creation-guy": "gadget-creation-guy.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-ed": "gadget-amalgamate-ed.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-edd": "gadget-amalgamate-edd.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-eddy": "gadget-amalgamate-eddy.bat {args}",
        "gadget-amalgamate-guy": "gadget-amalgamate-guy.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-ed": "agent-submit-ed.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-edd": "agent-submit-edd.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-eddy": "agent-submit-eddy.bat {args}",
        "agent-submit-guy": "agent-submit-guy.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-ed": "agent-amalgamate-ed.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-edd": "agent-amalgamate-edd.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-eddy": "agent-amalgamate-eddy.bat {args}",
        "agent-amalgamate-guy": "agent-amalgamate-guy.bat {args}",
        "onepush-ed": "onepush-ed.bat {args}",
        "onepush-edd": "onepush-edd.bat {args}",
        "onepush-eddy": "onepush-eddy.bat {args}",
        "onepush-guy": "onepush-guy.bat {args}",
        "create-targeted-onepush": "create-targeted-onepush.bat {args}",
        "land-anything": "land-anything.bat {args}"
      }
    },
    "wavproc": {
      "root": "tools/wavproc",
      "language": "mixed",
      "target_ref": "origin/gadgets/lambdascript/wavproc/main",
      "integration_branch": "gadgets/lambdascript/wavproc/main",
      "agent_branch_template": "gadget-agents/lambdascript/wavproc/{agent}",
      "owned_paths": [
        "tools/wavproc/",
        "docs/wavproc/"
      ],
      "verification_profiles": {
        "quick": [
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal build"
        ],
        "full": [
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal build",
          "cd tools/wavproc && cabal run wavproc -- --help"
        ]
      },
      "commands": {
        "wavproc": "cd tools/wavproc && cabal run wavproc -- {args}"
      }
    }
  },
  "imports": {}
}
